title: lathyrus luteus subsp. ochraceus
intro: Lathyrus luteus subsp. ochraceus, also known as the yellow pea or ochraceous pea, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant are attributed to its ability to help reduce oxidative stress, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
